item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i like halloween.. greetings online friends
not my cup of tea
as is tradition
i lived in AZ for a few years, lucky there isn't usually any humidity
absolutely
oh hell yeah
my mom would say stuff like this too, and we're white
ask for advice
they spelled thief right half the time
they can only move sideways
i guess
poor aussies
Gary Pepper, M.D.
we've all been in this exact situation
mmm hmm
got any more brain busters?
finally
that's my time, have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: The most prescient commenter in YouTube history
item.dc:creator: treefox

item.title: Dumping memes to distract myself from watching my rights vanish like a fart in the wind
item.description:
Woke up, Googled results, started sobbing
Put on all black and went to work anyway
Commiserated over coffee with my boss
Made it through the day trying to at least get the next generation to accept people for who they are. Felt like it made a small impact
Small impacts are better than nothing, so I'll take it
My ancestors were Hungarian refugees. I thought we were done with this shit.
One step at a time I guess. We survived it once.
Hot dog
Same.
Me.
My neuro class was talking gender today and I mentioned a parasite that turns crabs female. Suggested "imagine if you got bitten by a bug that turns you male" and one girl immediately made the gesture of doing the helicopter thing. It's a fun class.
True story, I do dream that I slept through class as the professor
Gee I wish I weren't living through a dystopian nightmare
Dog tax because we all need a bit of dopamine rn
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 102
item.description:
Columbia shuttle and 3 ½ hrs but ya.
The funniest of them all is everything in The One Where No One Is Ready
And then there's me. I will make your stupid idiot charger my #1 priority and end up forgetting my own stuff cause I dont want to let you down.
I'm forcing hubby to watch A League Of Their Own with me again. Send him memes of cats, he's allergic. @Prendsen

item.dc:creator: TheN8

item.title: Poison Ivy - Cosplay
item.description:
Hey everybody... How we all doing? Here is some cosplay to cut through it all... I am not going to talk much about the elephant in the room, other than saying this: I for one, plan on doubling my existence. You are only going to see way more of me. Best support you can give is to do the same for yourself, or speak up to others about why folks like myself should be here. That is where I will leave it. Love y'all :)
Reference image from the Harley Quinn Animated Series
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Good morning!
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Dump at the Museum
item.dc:creator: derek237

item.title: We will be here for one another. That's what we do.
item.description: I don't have good answers for any of us, except hope. That word that so much of our media revolves around that it is instilled into our core, that resolve for rebellion against hate, the bravery to help one another, all in the name of hope. I have a lot that people without empathy hate me for. I'm trans and rely on hormones. I'm autistic and adhd. I have eds and rely on steroids to not rip muscles, lupus and seizure meds, and drugs to let me sleep without screaming. I'm a wheelchair user who depends on social security, with barely enough funds to pay rent and utilities, struggling to buy food for this cat that apparently lives here now, let alone enough food to avoid malnutrition. I've survived childhood horrors and domestic abuse. I've survived homelessness when I was brave enough to get free. I went through remarkable pain of surgeries, therapy, and difficult life choices in order to reclaim myself and believe that I do have a future. I believe. I finally believe I can live. I may lose everything. I may lose funds to have a home. To eat. To get the meds that keep me alive, and the ones that make life worth living. I'm scared. Some have told me to not be scared. Those who deny the repeating history should stop and recognize why we are scared. Perhaps things will get so beyond the word horror we can describe that we simplify it to just the word Bad. Or perhaps they will only be horrific. I fear for the children. For the little girls too terrified to say no to their fathers or other men. For the girls who will be murdered for coming out as girls or enbies and refusing to deny who they are. For the boys and enbies who will be forced to grow up wearing a mask and pretending to be women, with their rights just as eradicated. For the girls, boys, and enbies who aren't straight. For the women, all the women, who have their rights to their bodies and lives stripped bare and helpless. For all the women already dead and dying. I'm scared that over half of this country voted for a convicted rapist, pedophile, sex trafficker, self admitted nazi, woman abuser, spouse cheater, transphobic, incestuous, hateful shit, let alone the grifting, lying, treason, and countless reasons people should have voted against in order to save their children. Despite all, I'm not giving up, so stay with me.
item.dc:creator: Teas

item.title: Cake day post from your therapist

EDIT: Thanks for the upvotes, Imgurians! Remember to be awesome with each other! I do some reviews (As a hobby, not paid!) at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1176 (cry)
item.description:
Let's get this bread, I guess, even though starving seems more fitting.
I fucking hate being right. Goddammit. No. I am not okay.
It was nice knowing you all. I'm pretty sure I won't last these four years as a marxist socialist autistic bisexual Eastern Orthodox person. As much as I want to flee... I'm not sure for one where I'd even go, but also, someone has to be the example of how to actually be a proper Christian human to these motherfuckers. Even if it might lead to my death. Even if I have friends who might die. I'm not looking forward to this. My extremely practical autistic friend Peter tells me not to worry, they can't set up a gulag system this early but dude, NOT A HELPFUL STATEMENT BRUH
All i can say is, If you are a LGBTQ person, or someo e who feels they are going to be targeted by the new regime (religion, disability, whatever) who is fleeing the country and need to pass through Arizona on your way out, my apartment is open for you to crash at on the way. It is a safe space (minus the probable Pippin bites, he bites everyone, even me). We can share some mead, go and scream into the desert night, and you get a place to stay for a night you won't have to pay for.
If I get killed (and assuming my body isn't immediately destroyed by the state), bury me or what's left in Pando. Use all my whiskey, gin, and other spirits to make molotovs to hurl at the fascists.
Pippin was even more cuddly than usual last night. I put him in his cage halfway through the night, and the minute I was back in bed under the covers, he broke out of his cage and forced his way through the covers to over my heart again and politely said "no" after he settled in.
This is the crossover that @ElbowDeepInAHorse needs.
I've been saying this as a response to that question for months now, and people are amused.
I wonder if someone had assassinated him instead of trying to assassinate the Orange One....
Oh, we can also do this if you crash with me on your exodus.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin! Step up. Pippin. Good boy."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: Zezustammany231
